name: North Vietnamese Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients together.

similar.name: Thai Red Pepper Dipping Sauce ( Hot )

name: Thai Red Pepper Dipping Sauce ( Hot )
directions: Crush red peppers and garlic in morter.
Transfer to a bowl, add everything; mix well.
Add small lime chunks.
Enjoy.

name: Asian Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve.
I suggest that you allow the sauce to sit for at least half an hour so all the flavors can blend together and make a smoother sauce.

name: Soy-Ginger Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients, serve.
Best if made at least an hour prior to serving.

name: Vietnamese Spicy Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine vinegar, juice, garlic, sugar and sauce in a small jug. Stand for 15 minutes.
Strain sauce, discard garlic, stir in chilli and coriander.

similar.name: Thai Red Pepper Dipping Sauce ( Hot )

name: Ginger Dipping Sauce
directions: Sauté garlic and ginger in hot oil 1 minute; remove from heat.
Whisk in remaining ingredients.

name: Spicy Soy Sauce
directions: In a bowl whisk together the vinegar, chili paste, gingerroot and the soy sauce.
Whisk in the oil until sauce is combined well.
Transfer the sauce to a bottle.
Shake sauce well before using.

name: Ginger Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine the garlic, sugar, chile and ginger in a small bowl or mortar.
Crush the mixture to a paste.
Add the lime juice and fish sauce and stir to blend.

name: Vietnamese Soy Sauce Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients and mix well. .

name: Asian Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a jar. Shake well. Let flavors mix for about 30 minutes.

similar.name: Thai Red Pepper Dipping Sauce ( Hot )

name: Sesame Soy Dipping Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients. Stir well to blend.

name: Sweet and Spicy Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine first 8 ingredients (soy sauce through sesame oil) in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring frequently. Whisk together cornstarch and cold water until blended. Whisk into soy sauce mixture. Bring to a boil, whisking frequently. Reduce heat and simmer, whisking constantly, until thickened, about 2 - 3 minutes.
Serve warm or cold. Do not freeze.

name: Ginger Soy Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients well with wire whisk in a small bowl.
Refrigerate unused portion.
